ruleset.name: CannyForge Archive god-class budget
ruleset.description:
The REAL, hard-failing god-class budget (ticket 102). PHPMD exits non-zero on violation, per-method and per-class — unlike PHP Insights' aggregate "complexity score" which drifts and only advises. This is the gate that actually fails the build when a class/method grows too complex. Calibrated to keep the archive engine small and cohesive: the kind of thousand-line settings/calculator god classes seen in legacy WordPress plugins would fail loudly here.
Only the code-size rules are enabled here; style/naming/unused are PHPCS, PHPStan, and Rector's job (no double-gating).
